message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title US031 - As Team Member, I want to create a task in a user story
autonumber
actor "TeamMember" as TeamMember
participant "CreateUSTaskUI" as CreateUSTaskUI
participant "CreateUSTaskController" as CreateUSTaskController
participant "Company" as Company
participant "taskTypeStore\n: TaskTypeStore" as taskTypeStore
participant "taskTypeList\n: List<TaskType>" as taskTypeList
participant "taskType\n: TaskType" as taskType
participant "taskTypesNames\n: List<String>" as taskTypesNames
participant "pStore\n: ProjectStore" as pStore
participant "proj\n: Project" as proj
participant "sList\n: SprintList" as sList
participant "sprint\n: Sprint" as sprint
participant "sprintBacklog" as sprintBacklog
participant "UserStoryList" as UserStoryList
participant "Us" as Us
participant "UsTaskList\n: TaskList" as UsTaskList
participant "taskList\n: List<Task>" as taskList
participant "task\n: Task" as task
participant "taskNames\n: List<String>" as taskNames
participant "projectTeam\n: ProjectTeam" as projectTeam
participant "projectTeam\n: List<Resource>" as projectTeam2
participant "resource\n: Resource" as resource
participant "currentResName\n: List<String>" as currentResName
participant ": TaskMapper" as TaskMapper
participant "createTaskDTO\n: CreateTaskDTO" as createTaskDTO
participant "newUsTask\n: Task" as newUsTask

TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI: 1 Ask to create a task of a user story
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController: 2 getTaskTypes()
CreateUSTaskController -> taskTypeStore: 3 getTaskTypesStore()
taskTypeStore -> CreateUSTaskController: 4 taskTypeStore
CreateUSTaskController -> taskTypeStore: 5 getTaskTypesNames()
taskTypeStore -> taskTypeList: 6 create()
loop for each know task type
    taskTypeList -> taskType: 7 get()
    taskType -> taskType: 8 taskType
    taskType -> taskType: 9 getName()
    taskType -> taskTypesNames: 10 typeName
    taskTypesNames -> taskTypesNames: 11 add(typeName)
    taskTypesNames -> taskTypeList: 12 true
end
taskTypeList -> CreateUSTaskController: 13 taskTypesNames
CreateUSTaskController -> CreateUSTaskUI: 14 taskTypesNames
CreateUSTaskUI -> TeamMember: 15 Show a list of task types
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI: 16 Selects task type
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController: 17 getUsTasks(projCode, sprintID, usId)
CreateUSTaskController -> pStore: 18 getProjectStore()
pStore -> CreateUSTaskController: 19 pStore
CreateUSTaskController -> pStore: 20 getProjectByCode(projCode)
pStore -> proj: 21 proj
proj -> CreateUSTaskController: 22 getSprintList()
CreateUSTaskController -> sList: 23 sList
sList -> sprint: 24 getSprint(sprintID)
sprint -> CreateUSTaskController: 25 sprint
CreateUSTaskController -> sprint: 26 getBacklog
sprint -> sprintBacklog: 27 sprintBacklog
sprintBacklog -> CreateUSTaskController: 28 getUsList
CreateUSTaskController -> UserStoryList: 29 usList
UserStoryList -> Us: 30 getUs(usId)
Us -> CreateUSTaskController: 31 us
CreateUSTaskController -> Us: 32 getUsTaskList()
Us -> UsTaskList: 33 usTaskList
UsTaskList -> CreateUSTaskController: 34 getTaskNames()
UsTaskList -> taskList: 35 create()
loop for each know task
    taskList -> task: 36 get()
    task -> task: 37 task
    task -> task: 38 getName()
    task -> taskNames: 39 taskName
    taskNames -> taskNames: 40 add(taskName)
    taskNames -> taskList: 41 true
end
taskList -> CreateUSTaskController: 42 taskNames
CreateUSTaskController -> CreateUSTaskUI: 43 taskNames
CreateUSTaskUI -> TeamMember: 44 Show a list of current tasks\n(no choose a precedence, if want)
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI: 45 Selects precedence (optional)
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController: 46 getCurrentProjectTeam()
CreateUSTaskController -> projectTeam: 47 getProjectTeam()
projectTeam -> CreateUSTaskController: 48 projectTeam
CreateUSTaskController -> projectTeam2: 49 getCurrentResourcesNames()
projectTeam2 -> currentResName: 50 create()
loop for each know resource
    currentResName -> resource: 51 get()
    resource -> resource: 52 resource
    resource -> projectTeam2: 53 isCurrent()
    projectTeam2 -> resource: 54 return
    alt result = true
        resource -> resource: 55 getName()
        resource -> currentResName: 56 resourceName
        currentResName -> currentResName: 57 add(resourceName)
        currentResName -> resource: 58 true
    end
end
projectTeam2 -> CreateUSTaskController: 59 currentResourcesNames
CreateUSTaskController -> CreateUSTaskUI: 60 currentResourcesNames
CreateUSTaskUI -> TeamMember: Shows resource list and request data\n61 (name, description, effortEstimate,\ntaskType, responsible)
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI: 62 Choose and typed requested data
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController: 63 createUsTask(createUsTaskDTO)
CreateUSTaskController -> UsTaskList: 64 createUsTask(createUsTaskDTO)
UsTaskList -> TaskMapper: 65 toModel(createUsTaskDTO)
TaskMapper -> createTaskDTO: 66 name = getName()
createTaskDTO -> TaskMapper: 67 description = getDescription()
TaskMapper -> createTaskDTO: 68 effortEstimate = getEffortEstimate()
createTaskDTO -> TaskMapper: 69 taskType = getTaskType()
TaskMapper -> createTaskDTO: 70 responsible = getResponsible()
createTaskDTO -> newUsTask: 71 createTask(name, description,\neffortEstimate, taskType, responsible)
newUsTask -> UsTaskList: 72 newUsTask
UsTaskList -> UsTaskList: 73 saveTask(newUsTask)
UsTaskList -> UsTaskList: 74 validate(newUsTask)
UsTaskList -> UsTaskList: 75 add(newUsTask)
UsTaskList -> CreateUSTaskController: 76 true
CreateUSTaskController -> CreateUSTaskUI: 77 created and saved successfully
CreateUSTaskUI -> TeamMember: 78 created and saved successfully

@enduml
```
